testDescription: [strict] NEGOTIATE_PAYMENT route_to='advisor' — advisor extracts: consultAcc='xxxxxx503620, xxxxxx503619', maxPayment=700

input.narrative: The customer was offered a restructuring plan with a monthly payment of 966 THB. The customer finds this too high and has requested to lower the payment to 700 THB per month. This request requires a modification of the proposed plan, so it is being routed to the advisor.
